valid: For the period 06:00 (UTC) on Sun 12 Jul 2026 to 06:00 (UTC) on Mon 13 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: High just west of Rockall 1033 expected Faeroes with little change by midnight tonight. Low Spain 1008 expected France with little change by same time. New low expected south FitzRoy 1010 by that time
